40d56f830591.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
40d56f830591.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
40d56f830591.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

dd4c7997e8ea.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
dd4c7997e8ea.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

116f784fba90.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
116f784fba90.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
116f784fba90.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

5f178adc3930.title: Address isolated value for money complaints from guests
5f178adc3930.description: Value for Money draws isolated criticism across reviews (1 negative mentions). One guest wrote: "Seemed expensive per pizza but they are not usual UK sizes..." Investigate whether this reflects a systemic issue or isolated incidents.
5f178adc3930.expected_upside: Reduce value for money complaints, protect rating
5f178adc3930.management_implication: Guests are telling you what's wrong. Listen.

2c0adfe3c1ee.title: Lean into food quality — it's what guests are buying
2c0adfe3c1ee.description: Guests consistently praise food quality (4 positive mentions). This appears to be what the venue actually sells, whether or not it's what you think you sell. Make it the headline of your online presence.
2c0adfe3c1ee.expected_upside: Sharpen proposition → attract the right guests
2c0adfe3c1ee.management_implication: Your guests are telling you your proposition. Use it.

d367980ca484.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
d367980ca484.description: At 121 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
